economic_notes: Operates SLFN Enterprises, Housing Authority, Gaming Commission, Farm, 6226124 Manitoba Ltd., SLFN Property Management Ltd. Also operates Four Corners Gas Bar, VLT Lounge, Potato Chip Plant, Wind Farm, and Fibre Optic Cable infrastructure.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations — management had not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential asset retirement obligations as of audit report date (April 26, 2024). Consolidated entities include SLFN Enterprises (100%), Swan Lake First Nation Housing Authority (100%), Swan Lake First Nation Gaming Commission (100%), Swan Lake First Nation Farm (100%), 6226124 Manitoba Ltd. (100%), and SLFN Property Management Ltd. (100%). Current liabilities include bank indebtedness $115,231, accounts payable $1,239,432, deferred revenue $3,560,745, and long-term debt due within one year $16,486,983. F.N.I.H.B. likely represents Health Canada transfers classified separately from ISC. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + Provincial funding + FNIHB.
